'''habaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:avelumab|avelumab]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:avelumab|avelumab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| habaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæbæhæth|hæbæhæth]] || [[word:hæbæhæj|hæbæhæj]] || [[word:hæbæhæsh|hæbæhæsh]] || [[word:hæbæhæ|hæbæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hababahath|hababahath]] || [[word:hababahaj|hababahaj]] || [[word:hababahash|hababahash]] || [[word:hababaha|hababaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:habahath|habahath]] || [[word:habahaj|habahaj]] || [[word:habahash|habahash]] || [[word:habaha|habaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:habafhafth|habafhafth]] || [[word:habafhafj|habafhafj]] || [[word:habafhafsh|habafhafsh]] || [[word:habafhaf|habafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:habahatha|habahatha]] || [[word:habahaja|habahaja]] || [[word:habahasha|habahasha]] || [[word:habahaka|habahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:habahath|habahath]] || [[word:habahaj|habahaj]] || [[word:habahash|habahash]] || [[word:habaha|habaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:habahathal|habahathal]] || [[word:habahajal|habahajal]] || [[word:habahashal|habahashal]] || [[word:habahakal|habahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:habahaathatha|habahaathatha]] || [[word:habahaajaja|habahaajaja]] || [[word:habahaashasha|habahaashasha]] || [[word:habahaaka|habahaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:habahathan|habahathan]] || [[word:habahajan|habahajan]] || [[word:habahashan|habahashan]] || [[word:habahakan|habahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:habahathaoro|habahathaoro]] || [[word:habahajaoro|habahajaoro]] || [[word:habahashaoro|habahashaoro]] || [[word:habahakaoro|habahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
